name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Career OS
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug

---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 💻 Environment
- OS: [e.g. iOS, Android, Windows, macOS]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari, PWA Standalone]
- Version: [e.g. v1.3.0]

## 📸 Screenshots / Recordings
If applicable, add screenshots or recordings to help explain your problem.

## ⚠️ Important Note
Please do **NOT** include sensitive personal data, passwords, JWT tokens, or private environment variables in this public issue report.
